channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: April Fools’ Day 2026 compilation
item.content:encoded:
NieR: COSMIC HORROR, Re:ZERO otome game, and more.

Welcome to the 2026 edition of Gematsu‘s annual April Fools’ Day games industry jokes and gags roundup, featuring the new NieR project NieR: COSMIC HORROR, otome game Re:ZERO – Starting Office Life in Another World, and more.

April Fools’ Day 2025 | 2024 | 2023 | 2022 | 2021| 2019 | More

(This post will be updated with new jokes throughout the day.)

■ Added at Press Time

● ALICESOFT

ALICESOFT enters the soft-serve ice cream industry.

● Aniplex / Disney Twisted-Wonderland

Twisted Drama Project: April Fools’ Day 2026. Starring Kent Ito.

● Aniplex / Fate/Grand Order

An graphics glitch is causing the in-game illustrations to change to illustrations by Riyo. This is also affecting some images on the official website and social media accounts.

● Aniplex / Puella Magi Madoka Magica Side Story: Magia Record

“Madoka-senpai’s Kioku” Madoka-senpai 3★ Kioku arrives April 1.

(Also available in Japanese.)

● Bandai Namco / Dragon Ball Legends

SPARKING “Farmer Goku” joins the fight!

● Bandai Namco / Taiko no Tatsujin x Drift Spirits

Introducing Taiko no Tatsujin Spirits.

● CCMC Corporation / holo Indie

The legendary baseball game Bases Loaded (Moero!! Pro Yakyuu) returns as Moeru!! Holo Yakyuu. Go for a homerun with hololive gamers. Play it here.

● Cygames / Granblue Fantasy

The “Happy Panicky Baby” event has begun. All of your allies have turned into babies. Help return them to their original forms.

● Cygames / Shadowverse: Worlds Beyond

Oh. I looked away for one moment, and the doggos I invited to the park are running wild. Some are even taking part in the matches. 🐶

It's all very adorable, but I suppose we should try to get things under control.#ShadowverseWB pic.twitter.com/vVB6NyzMmv

— Shadowverse: Worlds Beyond (@shadowversegame) March 31, 2026

● Cygames / Uma Musume

A Midori no Makibaou x Uma Musume TV anime collaborative opening.

● Kadokawa Corporation / Re:ZERO – Starting Life in Another World

Introducing Re: Zero – Starting Office Life in Another World, an otome visual novel featuring the boys from Re: Zero – Starting Life in Another World.

● KRAFTON / PUBG: BATTLEGROUNDS

Introducing “Prop Hunt,” a limited-time April Fools’ mode that brings a playful twist to the battleground experience.

In Prop Hunt, players are split into two roles: Props and Hunters. Props disguise themselves as everyday objects scattered across the map and attempt to stay hidden, while Hunters search for anything out of place and eliminate them before time runs out. The mode blends stealth, strategy, and deception, offering a lighthearted alternative to traditional combat gameplay.

Each match features 12 players divided into three Hunters and nine Props, played across three rounds. At the start of each round, players can choose their preferred role, with teams automatically balanced as needed.

Matches unfold in phases. During the preparation phase, Hunters remain in a restricted area while Props select disguises and position themselves. Once the round begins, Hunters must carefully identify and eliminate Props—firing at incorrect objects reduces their HP, adding risk to each decision. Near the end of each round, a brief “Fever Time” grants Hunters increased firepower and removes penalties for incorrect shots.

Props have access to a variety of abilities to stay alive, including deploying decoys, switching disguises, and using stun or flash effects to disrupt Hunters, encouraging dynamic and unpredictable gameplay.

Ahead of the launch, PUBG: BATTLEGROUNDS also released a teaser campaign styled as a home shopping showcase, introducing the mode in a playful and unexpected way.

● Key

Key states that since it is full-speed ahead on development for anemoi, it has no April Fools’ Day joke this year.

【お知らせ】
本年度の4月1日、エイプリルフールはanemoi開発に全力だった為、何もありません。
本当にありません。

ご理解のほど何卒宜しくお願い申し上げます。

Key開発スタッフ一同

— Key開発室 (@key_official) March 31, 2026

● Konami / Jikkyou Powerful Pro Baseball

Jikkyou Powerful Pro… Kabuki Baseball?

● MINTROCKET / DAVE THE DIVER

DAVE THE DIVER x Real VR Fishing collaboration announced. Coming in June 2026.

(Editor’s Note: This appears to be a real announcement.)

● NEOWIZ / Brown Dust II

Introducing “WHITE REAPER (Yodel Ver.)”

This yodel version of “WHITE REAPER” reimagines the original’s fierce determination to overcome darkness and trials, transporting that fighting spirit to the pristine, snow-capped peaks of the Alps.

The original’s heavy, tension-filled beats are now interlaced with the light, rhythmic vocal breaks characteristic of yodeling. The oppressive atmosphere of the battlefield has been transformed into a buoyant energy that dances across the mountain ranges. In place of cold, metallic textures, the rich resonance of the accordion and the playful plucking of the ukulele take center stage. This arrangement evokes the spirited stride of a hero preparing for a festival, rather than the solitary shadow of a reaper, refreshing the listener’s senses.

The soaring scats and “Yo-ho-ho” vocal motifs translate the resolve to confront challenges into a display of both playful charm and masterful technique. The vocal echoes, rising and falling like mountain ridges, reflect the composure of a victor effortlessly navigating rugged terrain.

While the lyrics still hold the firm resolve to face every battle without retreat, the bright tonal palette of the yodel softens the gravity of that vow, turning it into a “joyful challenge.” The powerful declarations of the chorus are reborn through sophisticated vocal flips, leaving behind a light, jubilant exclamation of victory rather than a somber decree.

By expanding “WHITE REAPER”—once a symbol of intense struggle—into a festive soundscape set on an Alpine meadow, this arrangement highlights the technical beauty of high-difficulty vocal transitions and clear articulation. We invite you to begin your journey with a light heart, accompanied by the “WHITE REAPER (Yodel Ver.)”—where even trials become a song.

(Also available in Japanese and Traditional Chinese.)

A four-minute “Dust Direct” has also been released.

● NEXTON / novamicus

● Smilegate / Chaos Zero Nightmare

Introducing the new Trading Card Game Mode!

(Also available in Japanese, Korean, and Traditional Chinese.)

● Square Enix / Dragon Quest

A liquid metal slime has been discovered on the ocean floor.

● Square Enix / Dragon Quest Walk

Dragon Quest Walk collaborates with the Yanboh and Marboh Weather Forecast.

● Square Enix / NieR

Introducing the new NieR project—NieR: COSMIC HORROR.

● Sunrise / Gundam

Celestial Being (the movie) will be released in 2314 AD.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/april-fools-day-2026-compilation
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
